sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Tokhom tunga Tuuno, lukhu namkim khuzo;
Ngai un, a ngaih vantung lapi,
La dang teng
mengkhin hi;
Ka kha aw tho inla, Nang ading hong si Pa;
A lian bel Kumpipa ci-in, A phatna la sa
in.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ki-itna Kumpipa, En ve un! A liamma;
A khut, A pang kimu lai hi,
Minphatna
in tuam hi;
Hih thupha lamdang lua, Phawkzawh lohin thuk lua;
Vantung mi’n zong en ngam
lo-in,
Kuun hi, nuai lam en in.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong kilemsak Kumpi, galvai vengsak Pa
hi;
Phatna aw, siatna suankhia-in, van nuai kilemna’ngin;
Vantung khuapi nuam sung, Amah in
uk tawntung;
A liam, Ama khe kimkot ah, dawnna paak kipia pah.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: A tawntunga Kumpi, hun
le ni uk Mangpi;
Leitung pumpi na piangsak zo, gen zawh loh Na Siangtho;
Hong tan ka Topa aw, kei
tang nang nong si maw;
Na min phat tawp ngei lo ding hing, a tawntung sa ding hing.
